whoP1: Flomerce is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform built to help small businesses, entrepreneurs, and creators launch their own professional e-commerce websites — without writing a single line of code. We believe that every business, no matter how small, deserves a powerful online presence.
whoP2: Based in Karwar, Karnataka, India, Flomerce was founded with a simple mission: make online selling accessible, affordable, and effortless for everyone.
whatLead: Flomerce provides a complete, all-in-one platform for creating and managing online stores. Each store gets its own branded subdomain (e.g., your-store.{{domain}}) and comes packed with everything needed to run a successful e-commerce business:

whatItems.builder: Store Builder: Create a fully functional online store in minutes with beautiful, ready-to-use templates
whatItems.products: Product Management: Add products with images, categories, variants, pricing, and inventory tracking
whatItems.orders: Order Processing: Complete order lifecycle management — from placement to delivery, with real-time status updates and customer notifications
whatItems.payments: Secure Payments: Accept payments through Razorpay (UPI, cards, net banking, wallets) and cash on delivery
whatItems.customers: Customer Management: Built-in customer accounts, wishlists, order history, and reviews
whatItems.analytics: Analytics & Insights: Track visitors, page views, traffic sources, and sales from your admin dashboard
whatItems.seo: SEO Tools: Built-in search engine optimization with meta tags, sitemaps, and Google structured data
whatItems.push: Push Notifications: Engage customers with automated alerts for new products, price drops, and back-in-stock items
whatItems.domains: Custom Domains: Connect your own domain name for a fully branded experience

missionP1: We are on a mission to democratize e-commerce for small businesses across India and beyond. Traditional e-commerce solutions are often expensive, complex, and require technical expertise. Flomerce eliminates these barriers by providing an intuitive, affordable platform that anyone can use.
missionP2: Whether you sell jewellery, clothing, beauty products, or any other retail goods — Flomerce gives you the tools to build your brand, reach customers, and grow your business online.

howItems.signup: Sign Up: Create your free account in seconds — no credit card required
howItems.build: Build Your Store: Choose a template, add your brand name, logo, and products
howItems.payments: Set Up Payments: Connect your own Razorpay merchant account to accept payments directly
howItems.live: Go Live: Your store is instantly live on your own subdomain, ready for customers

valuesItems.simplicity: Simplicity: We build tools that are easy to use, so you can focus on your business, not technology
valuesItems.transparency: Transparency: Clear pricing, no hidden fees, and honest communication
valuesItems.security: Security: Your data and your customers' data are protected with industry-standard security measures
valuesItems.support: Support: We are here to help you succeed — reach out to us anytime

contactIntro: We would love to hear from you. Whether you have questions, feedback, or need help getting started:
